description_long: This house features a prominent gable roof with a red finish and a skylight, paired with a large expanse of floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade, framed in light wood. The structure is attached to a tall brick wall at the rear, suggesting it may be an extension or conservatory. The side walls are primarily brick, with one side showing a smaller overhanging roof section. The rear of the house has a smaller glass door and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The interior appears spacious and open, with visible tiled flooring and ample natural light from the extensive glazing. The overall design blends modern elements with traditional materials, making it suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern house with a red gable roof, large front glass windows, and brick side and rear walls, attached to a tall brick wall.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large glass facade with wooden framing and the red gable roof, highlighting the main entrance and open interior.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full expanse of the red roof with a skylight and the tall brick wall, with large glass sliding doors below.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly brick wall with a small glass door and minimal windows, emphasizing privacy and separation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the brick wall, overhanging roof section, and the continuation of the glass facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, minimal windows on rear and sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is a large glass door integrated into the floor-to-ceiling window facade, with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing openness and modern design.
